# pheno-port-adapter

> Hexagonal port/adapter primitives for the pheno-* fleet. PortAdapter
> trait + TCP/Unix transport adapters.

## Files

- `Cargo.toml` — package manifest (v0.1.0)
- `src/lib.rs` — library root (PortAdapter trait, AdapterError enum, Connection struct)
- `src/adapters/mod.rs` — adapters module root
- `src/adapters/tcp.rs` — TCP transport adapter
- `src/adapters/unix.rs` — Unix-domain socket transport adapter
- `AGENTS.md` — agent context
- `WORKLOG.md` — change history (v2.1 schema)
- `CHANGELOG.md` — release notes
- `LICENSE-MIT` — MIT license

## Conventions

- Conventional Commits
- rustfmt + clippy (`-D warnings`)
- 80% lib coverage gate
- Hexagonal pattern: PortAdapter trait + Adapter impl (ADR-014)
- `thiserror` for error types
- 5 unit tests cover trait contract
